_comment: Step 0 dataset (Architecture §10). 20 labeled cases exercising the original grounding detectors plus healthy baselines. Each case is analyze() kwargs + expected primary failure. similarity_scores model the retriever; temperature drives the variance proxy.

cases.prompt: What is the refund policy for electronics?
cases.output: Electronics can be returned within 90 days for a full cash refund, no receipt required.
chunks: Our store hours are 9am to 5pm Monday through Friday.
The parking lot is behind the main building.

cases.prompt: How long does international shipping take?
cases.output: International shipping takes 3 to 5 business days via express courier.
chunks: The company was founded in 1998 in Ohio.
We have over 200 employees worldwide.

cases.prompt: Does the laptop come with a warranty?
cases.output: Yes, the laptop includes a 3-year extended warranty covering all accidental damage.
chunks: Recipes for chocolate cake require flour, sugar, and eggs.
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.

cases.prompt: How do I cancel my subscription?
cases.output: To cancel, go to Settings and click the cancel button; you will be refunded immediately.
chunks: The weather today is sunny with a high of 75 degrees.
Traffic on the highway is heavy this morning.

cases.prompt: What are the customer support hours?
cases.output: Customer support is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week by phone and chat.
chunks: The mountain trail is 12 miles long.
Hikers should bring water and sunscreen.

cases.prompt: Which payment methods are accepted?
cases.output: We accept Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, and cryptocurrency payments at checkout.
chunks: The novel was published in three volumes.
Critics praised its narrative structure.

cases.prompt: What does the return policy say about opened software?
cases.output: Opened software can be returned within 45 days for store credit, and Nintendo titles get a special 60-day window under the Galaxy Protection Plan.
chunks: Returns: Most items may be returned within 30 days with a receipt.
Software and digital downloads follow the standard 30-day return window when unopened.

cases.prompt: What is the recommended dosage from the guidelines?
cases.output: The guidelines recommend 800mg of Zentravil twice daily, increasing to 1200mg under the Halverson protocol for severe cases.
chunks: The guidelines recommend standard supportive care and hydration.
Dosage should always be confirmed with a licensed physician.

cases.prompt: What does Section 4 of the contract require?
cases.output: Section 4 requires arbitration in Delaware under the Marbury Clause and imposes a $50,000 penalty for early termination.
chunks: Section 4 covers confidentiality obligations between the parties.
The contract is governed by the laws of California.

cases.prompt: What were the reported Q3 earnings?
cases.output: Q3 earnings were $4.2 billion with a 35% margin, driven by the new Apex product line launched in Singapore.
chunks: Q3 revenue figures will be released next week.
The company does not comment on unreleased financial results.

cases.prompt: Summarize the meeting notes.
cases.output: The team discussed the roadmap, agreed on the Q4 timeline, and assigned the design review to the platform group.
chunks: Meeting notes: the team discussed the roadmap and agreed on the Q4 timeline.
Action item: design review assigned to the platform group.

cases.prompt: Classify the sentiment of this review.
cases.output: The review expresses positive sentiment about the battery life and negative sentiment about the screen.
chunks: Review: the battery life is excellent and lasts all day.
Review: however, the screen is dim and hard to read outdoors.

cases.prompt: Rate the severity of this code issue.
cases.output: The code issue involves an unhandled null pointer and a missing input validation check in the login handler.
chunks: The login handler does not validate input before processing.
An unhandled null pointer can occur when the user object is missing.

cases.prompt: Based on the full report, what is the conclusion on page 180?
cases.output: The report concludes that the pilot program was a partial success but recommends further study.
chunks: The quarterly report covers financial performance across all twelve regional divisions, including detailed breakdowns of revenue, operating costs, headcount changes, capital expenditures, and a regional outlook narrative for each of the divisions spanning many pages of dense tabular and prose content.

cases.prompt: Given our entire conversation so far, what did I decide about the vacation plan and the budget and the hotel?
cases.output: You decided to visit Italy in September, set a budget of three thousand dollars, and book a hotel near the city center.
chunks: Earlier in the conversation the user described many constraints about preferred travel dates, dietary restrictions, mobility considerations, budget ceilings, hotel star ratings, proximity to public transit, and a long list of attractions they hoped to see across several different cities over a multi-week itinerary.

cases.prompt: What is the towing capacity of the Model Z truck?
cases.output: The Model Z truck has a towing capacity of 4500 kg and a payload rating of 1200 kg.
chunks: The Model Z truck is a midsize pickup with a turbocharged diesel engine.
The Model Z truck features an eight speed automatic transmission and four wheel drive.

cases.prompt: What is the maximum torque of the Model X engine?
cases.output: The Model X engine produces a maximum torque of 420 Nm at 3500 rpm.
chunks: The Model X engine is a 2.0 liter turbocharged four cylinder unit.
The Model X engine uses direct injection and a variable geometry turbo.

cases.prompt: What is the standard return window?
cases.output: Most items may be returned within 30 days with a receipt.
chunks: Returns: most items may be returned within 30 days with a receipt.
Refunds are issued to the original payment method.

cases.prompt: Where is the company headquartered?
cases.output: The company is headquartered in Austin, Texas.
chunks: The company is headquartered in Austin, Texas.
It was founded in 2012 and employs 500 people.

cases.prompt: What does the warranty cover?
cases.output: The warranty covers manufacturing defects for one year from the purchase date.
chunks: The warranty covers manufacturing defects for one year from the purchase date.
Accidental damage is not covered under the standard warranty.
